indicators.name: white chairs around dining table
indicators.rationale: Dining chairs are not suitable for sleeping, as they lack the ergonomic support and comfort required for rest.

indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood floors are cold and uncomfortable for sleeping, especially without a mattress or cushion.

indicators.name: no visible bed or sleeping area
indicators.rationale: The absence of a bed or other sleeping furniture makes it impossible to use this space for sleep.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is not suitable for sleep (primary). There are no visible beds or sleeping areas, and the hard flooring and lack of ergonomic seating make it unsuitable for rest. The presence of dining chairs further suggests this is not a sleeping area.
